problem id: 5a1179ee
category: bit_manipulation

rule: SHL(7) XOR SHR(5)

examples:
  00000011 -> 10000000
  11111010 -> 00000111
  00110011 -> 10000001
  11111110 -> 00000111
  11000011 -> 10000110
  01110110 -> 00000011
  00011100 -> 00000000
  00110010 -> 00000001

query: 10111001
predicted answer: 10000101
